picks.quote: I like Shane Collins this week. I think he has a real path to win here.
I think Karol Rosa should be able to have more success keeping this fight on the feet... I had to take a stab on it.
If you're going to take anything on this, if you want to chase Chokheli this week, I'd probably just take his knockout prop
He should have the far, far better durability compared to a guy like Gaston Bolaños. So, if you're chasing this, the best way I would take it is go for a little Michael Asbell Jr. finish only
I think she should be able to really dominate Melissa Mullins, honestly... That's who I like the most out of every fighter.
Kevin Borjas, I don't think he wins... I'm looking for a potential live bet hedge on Andre Lima
If at any point I can get a nice live bet hedge on my boy Vinicius Oliveira at a tighter line than what it's at, going to be looking for that
I think Marat Gafurov is very, very live for the finish... You're taking a guy like Magomedov who is an absolute killer.
took a little pre-fight stab on Ion Cuțelaba moneyline plus 250. Ion Cuțelaba is one of these guys where he does look his best early on
overall, I do like Manel this week. I think he has the finishing upside.
He should be able to be defeated, I guess, by a guy like Murtazali Magomedov.
